action.reasoning: Observation: train.py has UnboundLocalError because train_dataset referenced before assignment; iter 2 training had NaN loss with lr=1e-4 linear probe despite LayerNorm. Analysis: need to fix ordering, and linear probe alone may be insufficient; fine-tuning whole vision with low lr and warmup can improve. Decision: rewrite train.py with proper ordering, use CLIPVisionModel (not full CLIPModel) to save memory, enable full vision fine-tuning with lr=2e-5, warmup+cosine schedule, gradient clipping, AMP, and fix model.py accordingly. Train 10 epochs, then submit eval.
